# zicon_project (Resource)

Manages a ZiCON Cloud project. There is no update endpoint, so any change to name, category, or description destroys and recreates the project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zicon_project" "example" {
  name        = "terraform-managed-project"
  category    = "Test"
  description = "created via terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the project.

### Optional

- `category` (String) Category of the project.
- `description` (String) Description of the project.

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key issued for the project, used to authenticate subsequent requests to it.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the project, assigned by the ZiCON Cloud API.
